author: HU-659621563
text: Working with Ratio Interiors was an absolute pleasure from start to finish. Their expertise in luxury bathroom fit-outs is unmatched, and the entire experience exceeded my expectations on every level. From the moment I walked into their beautifully designed showroom, I was impressed by the quality, elegance, and innovation on display. The selection of high-end fixtures, bespoke cabinetry, and designer finishes is curated with exceptional taste every piece felt carefully chosen to reflect both style and function. The team at Ratio Interiors is not only knowledgeable but also incredibly attentive. They took the time to understand my vision and guided me through the design process with professionalism and creativity. Every recommendation they made from materials to layout was thoughtful and tailored to my needs. The installation process was seamless, with meticulous attention to detail throughout. The craftsmanship is outstanding, and the final result is a bathroom that genuinely feels like a sanctuary. It’s luxurious, refined, and finished to perfection. If you're looking for a company that delivers high-end results with personalised service and true design expertise, I can't recommend Ratio Interiors highly enough. A flawless experience from beginning to end.

author: HU-44309346
text: Am happy to say i had a very good service work was very good the project went very well

author: HU-157049004
text: The work was amazing right on time really impressed with the work the workers they where very friendly the finish was better than what I expected and very good communication from start to the end of the project everything was finish on time very professional finish and a good company to work with

author: Andrew Adams
text: honestly can’t thank Ratio Interiors enough. From the very beginning they treated me with respect, patience, and honesty. They explained everything clearly and guided me through step by step, which made the whole process so much easier than I expected. I really want to mention Shareef because he went out of his way to help me. He took the time to answer all my questions, never rushed me, and made sure I felt comfortable with every decision. That kind of care is rare these days, and it really stood out to me. The kitchen and bathroom I got from them have completely changed my home. The quality is excellent, and the work was done exactly as promised. What meant the most to me though was how genuine and reliable they were from start to finish. If you’re looking for people you can truly trust with your home, Ratio Interiors is the one. I say this with certainty you won’t regret choosing them.

text: We are delighted with our new bathroom! The design, installation and workmanship was excellent throughout. text: They never said no and they never said they couldn't. What more could you ask for? One of the best interior designers I've seen. I don't say that lightly but honestly just wow

text: Absolutely delighted with the service received by Ratio Interiors! - very professional with advice given and their service is thorough and detailed. Not only did they provide expert knowledge, but their product catalogue works hand in hand. Thank you to the whole team and we look forward to working with them again, and recommending their services to friends and family.

author: Ashley Sandhu
text: The team @ the ratio offices designed my kitchen and 3 bathrooms from start to finish. Everything supplied and fitted by the team. The whole process was seamless and professional with a high quality finish. No obstacle was to difficult for the team to handle! Top job, highly recommend

author: Gee Sung
text: We are really happy with our loft conversion. We were living-in during most of the build with two small children and Sherif (owner) and his team did their best to make the experience as enjoyable as possible. From day one he reached out to our neighbours and gave them his contact number in case they needed him, doing his best to communicate well with everyone impacted. Sherif and I developed a great relationship, he is honest, considerate and works hard to deliver the results you want. As always with a build some things didn’t go perfectly to plan but I could rely on Sherif to ensure they were rectified quickly. Sherif was someone who I felt I could trust and that is a huge factor in any venture. Thanks again and wishing The Ratio Design & Build a prosperous future.

author: HU-691319761
text: I found The Ratio Design & Build through Instagram...... a massive risk I know! Usually you get recommended a builder by family or friends. However, we live in unprecedented times, in the middle of a pandemic, housing shortage is a continuing problem meaning house prices are ever increasing, and the majority of the public decided to renovate/extend their homes during lockdown! After selecting 4 Contractors and meeting with all of them, my wife and I decided to award the contract to Manny and his company, The Ratio Design & Build, based on the effort he put into the pre-contract process and the level of great communication we had. My wife's exact comment was "he seems to have integrity". In an industry that has a terrible reputation, finding a trustworthy, competent, honest and dedicated contractor is very difficult. We are halfway through the build now and I am very happy to report that so far my experience of The Ratio Design & Build has been a fantastic one. So much so that I don't want to jinx myself by reporting on it! I deal with Sherif on a daily basis as he is the co-owner of the company and deals with the operational side, whilst Manny I believe deals with the business development side. A whatsApp group was set up by the project manager (Aamir) from day 1 and it is a great tool to communicate any changes / issues / progress on it. I have found the project team on site hard working, professional and experienced. Don't get me wrong, there is always room for improvement for any company and for The Ratio Design & Build the areas to improve on are none of the fundamentals. Perhaps the site project team having a uniform with the company's logo to echo the professionalism of the company is an example of the level of improvement I'm talking about. Otherwise, all the core essential characteristics of a design and build contractor are all there. Treat these guys fairly and they will look after you and treat you even better. I'm talking about payments on time (again my experience of the industry means I know the importance of making payments on time as the majority of the payment is distributed down the chain of subcontractors and suppliers etc.). If you're making changes then be open and fair and understand there will be additional costs depending on the change and so far Sherif has been fair, accommodating of my design tweaks and even going beyond on some occasions just to help me realise my vision. To date, the Ratio Design and Build team have been hard working and delivering on time with no hiccups from their side (touch wood!!!). I will be updating this review at the end of the project to once again to give my honest and truthful experience of these guys.

author: aakrati
text: We are currently in the middle of our project and we have had excellent service from the entire Ratio team. We initially met with Manny who helped us create the initial design and estimate for our works, since then I have daily catch up with with Sherif who co owns Ratio with Manny who is very hands on with our project offering constant advice, including suggestions to save us money which is always a huge bonus. Aamir who has been assisting on the project has been very helpful in expediting the small details regarding our project and managing the project alongside Sherif. We have found the team to be very honest, reliable and helpful and we are so happy with the progress so far, in fact we are running ahead of schedule which is a rarity in build projects. Excited to see the end result and I have utmost faith in the Ratio team to be able to complete my project with great quality and in a timely manner.

author: HU-541472303
text: Project on our house has been completed. The entire project went fairly smoothly and when issues arose we were very impressed by how quickly the PMs were on site /on the phone to resolve the issues. The issues were ultimately solved and which is the most important thing and it was clear to see the desire and involvement that each member of the team had in order to complete the project to the highest standard. Impressed with these guys from the get go. Additionally every member on the team was polite and really easy to deal with.

author: HU-795295784
text: The team was very professional from start to finish turning up on time and ensuring the project was completed to a high spec. We had a complete refurb, taking out two interior walls and a ceiling to create a lofted kitchen with a through lounge. We also rewired the entire property with a new downstairs bathroom that was fitted. The team was very knowledgeable and always gave advice on where things could be done better and never complained when we wanted something added in at late notice. Highly recommend these guys as they gave us the dream house that we wanted.

author: HU-541472303
text: Currently have The Ratio doing internal decorating (installing wood panelling repainting a number of rooms), rebuilding our front garden wall and tiling the outdoor area. We are extremely impressed. Before the work starts they set up a group on whatsapp in order to make sure the process goes smoothly. Project managers are here overseeing the project everyday and the staff are extremely friendly and helpful. Couldn't recommend these guys enough!

text: First stage of build complete on a rear extension and cannot recommend these guys more. Sherif and Manny are very knowledgeable, and always offering great advice and solutions. Treats you as a friend but works professionally.

author: HU-851470599
text: Our project has been ongoing for 4 weeks now for a full house renovation. So far it has been going great, the guys are getting through the work to a good standard, turn up on time every day and to a high standard. Am very happy with the progress

text: Excellent quality work with great customer service. sheriff did a fantastic job managing the project, providing expert advice and very accommodative to changes and ad-hoc requests from our side . Fantastic company to work with , will not hesitate to ask them again for other building project.

author: HU-467379202
text: Great professional builders, working on a rear extension and whole ground floor re-furb. You can’t ask for a better team of builders

author: HU-122336389
text: Currently having an extension build. Now on to last internal works. Fantastic team who have done their best to keep us up to date with progress. Starting to see it all come together and am so happy. They are working flat out to give me a usable oven and kitchen area for Christmas Day. Lovely team and will be more than happy to share all pictures when done. Happy to give them 5 stars And recommend the team.

author: HU-826462506
text: My wife and I had a couple of leaking chimneys in our flat, which caused damp problems on the walls including our living area. We contacted Sherif for some help, and he arranged for the chimneys to be capped. Since then, the areas of damp have been drying out nicely!

author: M Dube
text: Competitive rates knowledgeable staff and great attention to detail.I have nothing to say but great things about my encounter with Ratio interiors.The showroom was great with a wide selection of styles and price points. I learned a bit from the guys in terms of what types of design would suit my budget and style preferences.My encounter with Sherrif was excellent and really appreciated not being pressured to commit there and then to an initial quote straight away. I had some time to think about and after visiting a couple other competitors and it only affirmed my decision to choose Ratio Interiors.It’s quite refreshing to come across companies that are not only motivated by desperate sales techniquesGreat service and would happily recommend the guys to all.

author: Nayim Mahomade
text: I recently had the pleasure of working with Ratio Interiors, and I am absolutely thrilled with the results! From start to finish, their team displayed exceptional professionalism, creativity, and attention to detail. They took the time to understand my vision and translated it into a stunning reality.The design process was seamless, with regular updates and open communication. The team’s ability to blend functionality with aesthetic appeal truly transformed my space. Their expertise in selecting the right materials, colors, and furnishings was evident in every detail.Moreover, the project was completed on time and within budget, which is a testament to their excellent project management skills. I couldn’t be happier with the outcome and would highly recommend Ratio Interiors to anyone looking to elevate their living or working space. Their dedication to excellence and customer satisfaction is unparalleled. Thank you for making my dream space a reality!

author: Abha Malik
text: Sharif and his team from Ratio refurbished our 1930s house, the project was completed as promised within the timeframe and to an excellent quality. We could not have asked anything better!! The work was done with great care and to perfection. We highly recommend Ratio to anyone looking to refurbish or to build a new, they are one of the best in the industry. You can totally depend on them to deliver high quality and in time.

author: Shaheed M
text: The Ratio Interiors team did a fantastic job converting our loft and kitchen bathrooms Communication has been great from start to finish, the pricing has been fair, and all of the tradesman were polite and professional. The company we’re patient with the communication between us Would definitely recommend to others

author: Rachael Panday
text: My husband and I used The Ratio for our first home renovation and loft conversion together, full of hope and optimism at the beginning of the process. With no previous experience in construction we had no idea what to expect, but Sherif and Manny seemed very reassuring.The build was extremely slow, sometimes with only one or two men on site, and despite complaining over and over and asking for a Gantt Chart to monitor progress, we were ignored and told it was going at a good speed which was clearly not the case.The Ratio initially asked for a 3 month retainer and they argued this was standard across the industry. We now know this is untrue, and 1 year is the standard, for the purpose of the house living through all 4 seasons of a year. We managed to agree on a 6 month retainer. Once the build was ‘complete’ we were asked to move into the house for 6 months before releasing our retainer.When we moved in we experienced endless issues with the house.- Downstairs toilet pipe was not connected properly and burst open causing a serious ground floor flood which then caused permanent water damage to our new floor, skirtings and fresh paintwork.- The new boiler pressure repeatedly dropped for a year due to a leak in the system. It took a year to find the leak due to pipes not being connected properly. We also eventually found out the boiler had been installed by a ‘plumber’ who was not gas safe certified and our boiler was decommissioned.- The new under floor heating system and radiators would not work, they were installed by the same plumber above.- The bath tub flooded on its first use due to pipes not being connected properly, causing more water damage.- Hallway lights which could not be turned on. We spent thousands on a new electrician trying to fix the brand new wiring.- All three showers leaked despite 4 attempts of The Ratio to return and try and fix them. They then siliconed the outsides of the showers which looked awful.- No gutters were installed on the loft conversion so rain cascaded down the brick work of the house. We spent thousands hiring new scaffolding in order to install gutters.- A bifold toilet door which constantly jammed as it had not been installed on a track.- The washing machine leaked due to pipes not being connected properly.Every time we complained about living with these issues, we were told “it’s just snagging” and we needed to stop asking for favours to come and fix small things. However, none of these were snagging issues, we were dealing with serious house defects. The project manager tried to fix these defects himself and ended up causing more damage as he was not an electrician or plumber, and would not send qualified tradesmen as he was trying to save money.In the end we had no choice but to walk away and spend 12 more months juggling work and finding new trustworthy tradesmen to fix the damage left by The Ratio. We spent an extra £20k and have heard nothing from The Ratio, other than to ask for their retainer money. It was a total nightmare experience, with gaslighting and a lack of human decency resulting in huge amounts of stress and disappointment.

author: Parwinder Singh
text: Sharif from The Ratio Interiors did a fantastic job. He completed the job within the time frame he had given and has excellent management skills.I would definitely recommend The Ratio Interiors team.

author: Paul Martin
text: I'm one of the Major suppliers to the Ratio Interiors . Our relationship over the past few years has gone from strength to strength and they always take on board guidance and advice to grow the capabilities of their business .It's been a pleasure.Paul of Crown Kitchens and Waterline.
